title: Client Site Workbench
concept: A table-led Playground manager for agency developers, with beginner-readable action cards, explicit save destinations, and consequence messaging shown before destructive changes.
focus: distinct beginner launch and import cards
visible save, import, reset, and export outcomes
flows: select a temporary Playground, choose Save in this browser or Save to a local directory, watch progress, and see the saved table state
start from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or zip import with route-specific inputs
browse Blueprint categories, search cards, inspect a selected Blueprint, and run it over the current site
open Site Manager tabs for settings, file browser, blueprint, database, and logs
rename, delete, reset/reload, export to GitHub, and download zip with visible consequence notices
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
